item.text: I’m going to scan the workspace with `rg` for `PolicyDenial` and `AuditSink` definitions/impls, then open only the matching files with focused `sed -n` reads to confirm each constructor and impl site precisely.
I’ve got initial hits; next I’m narrowing to Rust source files only and classifying each `PolicyDenial` occurrence as constructor vs pattern-match so we only include true emit/synthesis sites.

I confirmed the obvious sites; I’m now running one wider regex pass (including multiline `impl` signatures) to ensure there are no hidden `AuditSink` implementations or `PolicyDenial` constructors beyond those files.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes `let denial = LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` when `EnforcedAuditSink` intercepts a disallowed `ToolCallRequested`, then emits it.

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
